rationale: The proposed statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not conflict with Gov't Code §2001.026, which governs agency rulemaking notice procedures. Any implementing rulemaking would simply follow existing notice requirements.
quote: A state agency shall mail notice of a proposed rule to each person who has made a timely written request of the agency for advance notice of its rulemaking proceedings.
_note: No conflict; §2001.026 is a general procedural provision applicable to any subsequent rulemaking.
